events.title: Pitch Night - February 2026
events.description: February 2026 Pitch Night featured founders across vehicle security, mental health, agtech, UAVs, scheduling, and inspection tech. Agrivanna took home the microgrant.

judges.name: Kartavi Shah
judges.title: Founder & Managing Director, NextGen Founders Lab

judges.name: Musap Abdelhag
judges.title: Founder & CEO, SIYS | Struggle Is Your Success

founders.name: Jeremy Hunter
founders.pitchTitle: Non-wireless internal vehicle security system to stop theft before a car moves. Hardware-first approach that protects vehicles in ways thieves cannot bypass through signal hacking.

founders.name: Evezi Esiehor
founders.pitchTitle: Bridges the gap between rising mental health needs and limited preventative support for young adults through a hybrid digital platform and curated in-person experiences building emotional resilience and community connection.

founders.name: Amirhossein Foroughi & Haden Harrison
founders.pitchTitle: AI-powered virtual fencing and smart herd management for ranchers. GPS collars and real-time alerts reduce labour, replace costly fencing, and improve animal health and land productivity.

founders.name: Liam Mah & Haziq Sabri
founders.pitchTitle: Specialized unmanned aerial vehicle for Arctic operations with the Canadian Coast Guard. Complements helicopter missions, lowers operating costs, and reduces human risk in extreme environments.

founders.name: John Idowu
founders.pitchTitle: Canadian-built scheduling platform for service businesses. Combines bookings, payments, calendar sync, and automation in one dashboard to help professionals grow.

founders.name: Diogo José Notario Guaitolini
founders.pitchTitle: Transforms inspection photos and field notes into structured, standards-aligned reports automatically. Engineers shift from writing reports to validating them, saving time and improving consistency and auditability.

events.title: Pitch Night - January 2026
events.description: Join us for our January 2026 Pitch Night where early-stage founders present their ideas to a panel of experienced judges. Get feedback, make connections, and take the next step in your entrepreneurial journey.

founders.name: Essam Abdelhamid
founders.pitchTitle: Unified patient records across Canadian healthcare

founders.name: Ibukun Olajide (Temi)
founders.pitchTitle: Mobile pre-ordering solution for high-traffic retail environments like food courts, sport events, festivals, and shopping malls—helping customers skip lines and vendors serve more people.
